name: daily-xuanzang
description: Daily Xuanzang / 每日大唐西域记 — progressive reading of the Great Tang Records on the Western Regions (大唐西域记), following Xuanzang's Western Journey across the Silk Road and India, with bundled source text, auto-tracked progress, a bilingual route map each episode, vernacular/English translation, and optional art & voice. | 逐段讲读玄奘《大唐西域记》全12卷，自带原典，自动追踪进度，每期配中英文路线地图、白话翻译、可选配图与语音。
author: Tommy Yan <thriller.yan@gmail.com>
